generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on motor for position and velocity measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated Coulomb-Viscous friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionDataTransmitted
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CoulombViscousModel
]

instance StribeckFrictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated Stribeck friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StribeckFrictionDataTransmitted
]

instance StribeckFrictionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StribeckModel
]

instance DahlFrictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated Dahl friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DahlFrictionDataTransmitted
]

instance DahlFrictionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DahlModel
]

instance LuGreFrictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated LuGre friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LuGreFrictionDataTransmitted
]

instance LuGreFrictionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuGreModel
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from current and friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulatedOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSimulatedOutputDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorSimulatedOutputDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulatedOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel output data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelSimulatedOutputDataTransmitted
]

instance GearwheelSimulatedOutputDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SystemSimulatedOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemSimulatedOutputDataTransmitted
]

instance SystemSimulatedOutputDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for data representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossIdentificationInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard for visualizing friction models and motion data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model-based control parameter adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionLossIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss identification enabling control parameter adjustments for improved motion accuracy in machining applications"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system parameters and friction models"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control parameters based on friction model identification"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor acting as current-to-torque converter"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel for rotational energy transformation"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for torque transmission"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live sensor data streaming via MQTT, enabling continuous model identification during robot operation"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating structural SysML models, behavioral Simulink friction models, and operational data via AAS with real-time MQTT data linking and unified dashboard visualization"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated stage, utilizing live operational data to capture wear-induced changes and dynamic friction behavior during robot use"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission between physical robot and digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for system modeling and data description."
]
